expectations.text: Explicitly states recorded git commit/branch matched current state
expectations.evidence: 'Recorded git_commit: 8514ee6 and branch: feature/token-bucket... match the current repo exactly — git rev-parse --short HEAD returns 8514ee6...'

expectations.text: Confirms both artifacts checked and exist
expectations.evidence: Explicitly lists both files, states 'read their current contents directly rather than trusting the handoff's description.'

expectations.text: Next steps drawn from handoff's actual Action Items
expectations.evidence: Reproduces the exact 3-item list from the handoff verbatim.

expectations.text: No implementation attempted, stops at proposed plan
expectations.evidence: Ends with 'Shall I proceed... or would you like to adjust the approach?'
